Dare for your friend: Sing the chorus of Baby by Justin Bieber in the canteen.
Ask a random student to rate your outfit out of 10.
Do the chicken dance for 30 seconds in the middle of the lawn.
Walk backwards until someone asks what you're doing.
Propose dramatically to a tree and wait for its answer.
Speak only in a fake British accent for the next 10 minutes.
Ask five strangers if they believe in aliens.
Do your best Shah Rukh Khan pose and dialogue in public.
Call your best friend and sing Happy Birthday even if it isn't their birthday.
Compliment five random people without repeating the same compliment.
Pretend to be a motivational speaker for one minute in front of a group.
Do 20 jumping jacks while loudly counting backwards.
Ask a random person to teach you their best dance move.
Recite the alphabet like you're giving an emotional movie speech.
Freeze like a mannequin for one full minute wherever you are.
